- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
    <!-- Scaffolding for a Next.js project with Tailwind CSS using JavaScript. -->

    <!-- Used `npx create-next-app` with tailwind flag and converted to JS. -->

- [x] Customize the Project
    <!-- Converted TypeScript files to JavaScript, removed TS dependencies/configs, updated README. -->

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
    <!-- No extensions required. -->

- [x] Compile the Project
    <!-- Project built successfully with `npm run dev` and no errors. -->

- [ ] Create and Run Task
